div.head: The Minister in Switzerland (Harrison) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 1090. My 1089, October 6, 10 a.m.Not printed; see telegram No. 1086, September 17, 1937, 2 p.m., from the Consul at Geneva, and footnote 45, ibid., p. 23. In view of the fact that many states including some of the chief military powers have still not defined their attitude to the principle of a convention on publicity for national defense expenditure the Council yesterday unanimously decided to postpone fixing the date for a new meeting of the Bureau until the next ordinary session of the Council.
